Legacy

Legacy Aevo - Trade Perps, Options and Strategies is a true real-time platform with no start of day files to reconcile or end of day files to post, we provide APIs for real-time interactions.

Low-cost pricing to launch and scale your product with new revenue opportunities not previously available, and credits to help you get started.

No need for "testing in production", Aevo - Trade Perps, Options and Strategies’s Sandbox environment is identical to production enabling you to build and launch faster.

A dashboard

People Also Ask About AEVO - Trade Perps, Options and Strategies

AEVO - Trade Perps, Options and Strategies leverages a high-performance Layer 2 solution to provide efficient, low-latency trading of perpetual contracts and options with deep liquidity.

AEVO - Trade Perps, Options and Strategies offers a hybrid model combining an off-chain order book for fast trade execution with on-chain settlement, ensuring both speed and security for traders.

Yes, AEVO - Trade Perps, Options and Strategies allows users to trade crypto options, providing various strike prices and expirations to suit different risk management strategies.

AEVO - Trade Perps, Options and Strategies operates on a decentralized Layer 2 rollup, ensuring transparency, security, and trustless settlement of trades while reducing gas fees.

The dashboard design was created using Tailwind CSS, resulting in a sleek and modern interface.

A sales

The company's innovative new product has provided a strong sales tailwind, propelling them to exceed their revenue targets.

Built with
